meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for SaaS Success
content.seo_description: Overcome the SaaS knowledge gap with this advanced checklist. Learn to build professional apps using the Antigravity template and Claude Code effortlessly.
content.answer_block: The 'no SaaS knowledge' hurdle is an illusion created by fragmented tooling. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you abstract away boilerplate complexity, allowing you to focus on core logic. Pairing this with Claude Code creates an autonomous development loop that accelerates your transition from student to professional SaaS architect.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. You have the ambition to ship a SaaS, but the architecture feels like a labyrinth of hidden dependencies, auth protocols, and database migrations. The industry makes it look like magic, but it is just systematic engineering.

This checklist is your bypass. We are leveraging the Antigravity project template—a battle-tested foundation designed to strip away the noise—and combining it with the raw, autonomous power of Claude Code. Stop reading theory and start shipping production-grade code that defines your portfolio.

steps.title: Scaffold the Foundation
steps.description: Initialize your workspace using the Antigravity template to ensure your project structure follows industry-standard patterns from commit zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity boilerplate. Include modular auth, PostgreSQL schema, and Stripe integration stubs.

steps.title: Define Domain Logic
steps.description: Explicitly define your business entities within the Antigravity schema to prevent technical debt early in the development lifecycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a User-to-Subscription relationship model. Ensure all fields are typed with Zod and match the Antigravity standard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the schema in /src/db and implement the user-subscription relationship'

steps.title: Autonomous Feature Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on UI components, ensuring they conform to the existing design system without manual styling overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard component that fetches data from the /api/dashboard endpoint using standard Antigravity hooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create a dashboard component using the standard UI library that renders user metrics'

steps.title: Security & Middleware Hardening
steps.description: Configure the security layer to protect your routes. This step ensures your app is production-ready, not just a proof-of-concept.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement secure middleware to verify JWT tokens on all /api routes defined in the Antigravity template.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure auth middleware for all protected routes'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Finalize your CI/CD flow to automate testing and deployment, mimicking the workflow of top-tier engineering teams.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the GitHub Actions workflow for the Antigravity project to run linting, tests, and staging deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys this project to Vercel'

pro_tips: Treat the Antigravity template as a living document; always run 'npm run lint' before asking Claude to modify complex logic to avoid hallucinated imports.
Use Claude Code's 'context' feature to feed it your API documentation so it doesn't deviate from your established internal patterns.
Never accept the first iteration of code; always ask Claude to 'refactor for readability and O(n) performance' to learn advanced optimization patterns.
Keep your database migrations small and frequent; use Antigravity's migration tools to track schema evolution rather than manual SQL tweaks.
Master the art of the 'system prompt' in Claude; define your coding style (e.g., 'Functional Programming, clean code, no boilerplate') to keep outputs consistent.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on implementing an analytics tracking loop and a feedback mechanism to iterate based on real user data rather than assumptions.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the tools and the strategy to bypass the common traps of SaaS development. Stop building alone and start building like a pro. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
